notes: The stillHORIZ3N version of Clockwork Infinity. Same structural story, 'torch' instead of 'frequency' — this album is reflective not defiant. AUDITED 2026-04-20: mirror rr-1's audit on this quieter version. 'Quarter' stays (hold). Verse lines demoted to ribbons. The reckoning ('it led') and the centerpiece hook ('whispers #3') stay as keys. The first two 'whispers' are ribbons that let #3 land harder.

chunks.note: Quarter — single word held, first key of SH track
Been carrying the torch — reflective ribbon
whispers #1 — ribbon, first mention rides soft
-ed flurry pt1 — cooler tone, one rhyme per chunk
I chose the road — setup ribbon
but I cant help where it led — reckoning, warmth returns, KEY
whispers #3 — centerpiece, BIGGEST key on this quieter version
kick to a drum — softer close ribbon
